title: HOMESOURCE - 211info
text: BEND OFFICE HOMESOURCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers first-time home ownership classes, counseling, financial literacy classes, individualized financial coaching, credit counseling, down payment assistance loans, reverse mortgage counseling, mortgage payment assistance, help with property taxes, asset building, matched savings programs known as Individual Development Accounts, and low-interest, payment-deferred home rehabilitation loans. 20310 Empire Avenue Suite A100 Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 548-2380 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 548-2380 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Varies by program. Many services are no cost. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties and the Confederated Tribes of Warm Springs SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-4:30pm Services: Credit Counseling Financial Literacy Training Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Home Rehabilitation Programs Homebuyer/Home Purchase Counseling Individual Development Accounts Reverse Mortgage Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - CENTRAL OREGON’S COORDINATED ENTRY SYSTEM HOUSING/SHELTER - EMERGENCY SHELTER HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - WEATHERIZATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - LENDING MONEY MANAGEMENT - REPRESENTATIVE PAYEE PROGRAM UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BEND OFFICE
